actionUnits.condition: Physics collision-based event. Script Reset (MonoBehaviour id: 1648876975, m_Script: {fileID:11500000, guid:22172de818174a8b99ab08c2d6c3f0b2}) listens to OnCollisionEnter and teleports the colliding object to StartLocation=(9.47,-6.6,-5.84) if the collider's GameObject tag is 'XRRig' or 'Weapon'. The attached MeshCollider (id:1648876976) is currently configured with m_IsTrigger=1 and m_Convex=1, so OnCollisionEnter will NOT fire for this object; either set m_IsTrigger=0 or provide an interacting Rigidbody with a non-trigger collider on this object and a non-trigger collider on the other body. At least one of the two must have a Rigidbody (Reset Plane has none). Provide a Rigidbody GameObject tagged 'Weapon' or 'XRRig' to collide with this plane.
